extension.news:
[v1.0.1] - coreELEC-IL Repository Update - Added Safe Boot Manager addon (service.safeboot.manager). - Added support for service providers: Trakt, TorBox, AllDebrid, Real-Debrid, Premiumize and EasyNews. - On first install, select which providers to enable — checked on every boot. - If not connected, a prompt appears to connect directly without digging through POV settings.
[v1.0.0] - coreELEC-IL Repository Launch - Added new addon to Program category: AutoCompletion [CoreELEC-IL Edition]. - Server configuration and folder structure update.
extension.disclaimer: This addon is provided AS-IS. Developed and verified for the CoreELEC-IL community on Homatics hardware running the NG version. Use on other systems at your own risk.
התוסף מסופק כפי שהוא (AS-IS). פותח ואומת עבור קהילת CoreELEC-IL על גבי חומרת Homatics בגרסת NG. שימוש על מערכות אחרות הוא על אחריות המשתמש.

addon.name: AutoCompletion [CoreELEC-IL Edition]
addon.provider-name: Philipp Temminghoff, sualfred, xulek, kicking-bird-py | CoreELEC-IL

extension.description: High-performance version featuring Hebrew RTL fixes, smart caching, and exclusive POV search optimization. Verified on Homatics Box R 4K Plus running CoreELEC NG. *** NOTE: This addon requires a supported skin. Examples: Arctic Fuse, Arctic Horizon 2 (AH2), Titan BINGE, FENtastic, Nimbus, and Embuary. ***

גרסה מיועלת ומהירה הכוללת תיקוני עברית (RTL), מערכת Caching חכמה ואופטימיזציית POV. נבדק ואומת על Homatics Box R 4K Plus תחת CoreELEC גרסת NG. *** שים לב: תוסף זה מחייב סקין תומך המטמיע את המנגנון במקלדת. סקינים תומכים לדוגמה: Arctic Fuse, Arctic Horizon 2 (AH2), Titan BINGE, FENtastic, Nimbus, ו-Embuary. ***
extension.disclaimer: This addon is provided AS-IS. Developed and verified for the CoreELEC-IL community on Homatics hardware running the NG version. Use on other systems at your own risk.
התוסף מסופק כפי שהוא (AS-IS). פותח ואומת עבור קהילת CoreELEC-IL על גבי חומרת Homatics בגרסת NG. שימוש על מערכות אחרות הוא על אחריות המשתמש.
extension.news:
[v3.0.1] - Bug Fix Update - [Fix] 'clean_for_provider' is now actually invoked before sending text to POV (it was defined but never called in v3.0.0). - [Fix] The cleaning logic now also strips trailing season/episode/part numbers attached to garbage words (e.g. "Season 8", "עונה 8"), not just the word itself. - [Improvement] Rebuilt the cleaning dictionary into categorized, prefix-aware rules (Hebrew prefixes like ה-/ו-/ש- are now recognized) with full English-language support added alongside Hebrew.
[v3.0.0] - CoreELEC-IL Major Update - [Architecture] Integrated Package: Script and modules are built-in. No additional addons or dependencies will be installed. - [UX] Ready-to-Use: No manual settings required. Search language and RTL are pre-configured for Hebrew. - [Requirement] REQUIRES a supported skin: Arctic Fuse, AH2, Titan BINGE, FENtastic, Nimbus, Embuary, etc. - [Hardware] Fully verified on Homatics Box R 4K Plus (CoreELEC NG version). - [Development] Full Python 3 migration and code rewrite. - [POV Optimization] Implemented 'clean_for_provider' logic to maximize search hits. - [Performance] Added 7-day intelligent caching and 10s network timeout.

extension.summary: Saving Kodi from crashing every time you click your remote like crazy.
התוסף שיציל את המערכת מקריסה בכל פעם שאתם לוחצים על השלט כמו משוגעים.
extension.description: We all know the drill: Kodi boots up, you rush to press the remote, and BAM – everything freezes and goes to sleep. Especially on (Kodi – CoreELEC) systems or those slow-morning streamers. Instead of pulling the power plug, this add-on is here to save your sanity: * Startup Guardian: Safely blocks your trigger-happy fingers for a few seconds during boot, while showing a nice status bar until it's safe to click. * Exit & Transition Protection: Cleans up memory behind the scenes so your streamer won't have a mini heart attack when you exit a movie too fast. * The Panic Button: Video acting up? Don't hunt for the stop button. Just press the Back key 3 quick times, and it will force-close the player instantly. Everything can be easily changed or turned off in the settings, so you can click in peace.

כולנו מכירים את זה: המכשיר נדלק, אתם ממהרים ללחוץ על השלט כדי לראות משהו, ובום – הכל קופא ונתקע. זה קורה המון במערכות (Kodi – CoreELEC), או בסטרימרים שמתעוררים לאט בבוקר. במקום לנתק מהחשמל, התוסף הזה בא לעשות סדר בבלאגן: * בועת הגנה בהדלקה: חוסמת לכם את האצבע לכמה שניות כשהמערכת עולה, ומראה לכם בסטייל שהכל נטען בשקט ברקע. בלי פאניקה. * הגנה ביציאה ובמעברים: מנקה את הזיכרון מאחורי הקלעים כדי שהסטרימר לא יחטוף התקף לב כשאתם יוצאים מהר מדי מסרט או מחליפים ערוצים. * כפתור מילוט מהיר: נתקע הנגן? אל תחפשו את כפתור העצירה. 3 לחיצות מהירות על כפתור החזור בשלט – והסרט נסגר בשבילך בצורה בטוחה. אפשר לשנות, לכבות או להפעיל את הכל בקלות דרך ההגדרות, כדי שתוכלו ללחוץ בשקט.
extension.news:
v1.0.5 - [Bug Fix] Fixed additional bugs in the strings.po translation file. [Cleanup] Removed old and unused localization string entries from the translation file. [Bug Fix] Fixed an issue in the settings.xml configuration file.
v1.0.4 - Translation bug fixes.
v1.0.3 - Translation bug fixes.
v1.0.2 - [Security Fix] Introduced a single, mandatory access point (get_provider_token) for reading any credential from POV, used by all six providers — Trakt, TorBox, AllDebrid, Real-Debrid, Premiumize, and EasyNews. Any token logging now automatically goes through masking (last 4 characters visible only), instead of relying on each call site to remember to mask it. [Bug Fix] Fixed "Can't find window keyboard" error: corrected the window name used to detect the on-screen keyboard from "keyboard" to the correct Kodi window name "virtualkeyboard", across all checks (boot sequence, player overlay, and the Guardian loop).
[Feature] The "connect now?" prompt (previously only shown for Trakt/TorBox) now appears for all 6 supported providers — AllDebrid, Real-Debrid, Premiumize, and EasyNews are included too. [Bug Fix] Added missing localization strings for AllDebrid, Real-Debrid, Premiumize, and EasyNews status messages — they were referenced by the code but missing from strings.po, causing blank text during boot for those providers.
v1.0.1 - Added support for service providers — Trakt, TorBox, AllDebrid, Real-Debrid, Premiumize and EasyNews. On first install, select which providers to enable — checked on every boot. If not connected, a prompt appears to connect directly without digging through POV settings.
v1.0.0 - First stable release. Added startup and playback protection overlays, memory cleanup on fast exit, and 3 quick back-key force-stop mechanism.
